description_long: This rifle features a robust, metallic construction with a dark, weathered finish, giving it a utilitarian and battle-worn appearance. The main body is cylindrical with a prominent barrel, vented handguard, and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. A mounted optical sight sits atop the receiver, suggesting enhanced targeting capabilities. The stock is compact and integrated, with no visible extension or folding mechanism. The magazine appears to be internal or not externally visible, maintaining a streamlined profile. Subtle details such as screws, rails, and textured surfaces add to its realistic and functional design.
description: A dark, metallic rifle with a cylindrical body, pistol grip, and mounted optical sight, featuring a compact, integrated stock and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the barrel, handguard, pistol grip, and mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel opening, and the alignment of the sight along the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's profile, grip, and sight, mirroring view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock end, sight alignment, and the back of the receiver.
